zh: 預約；在餐廳預訂特定日期和時間的座位。
en: Making a reservation in a restaurant means asking to reserve a table for a specific day and time.
en_example: Making a reservation in a restaurant means asking to reserve a table for a specific day and time.
zh_example: Making a reservation in a restaurant means asking to reserve a table for a specific day and time.
ja: 予約；レストランで特定の日と時間に席を確保すること。
ja_example: Making a reservation in a restaurant means asking to reserve a table for a specific day and time.

zh: 男服務生；負責為顧客送餐和飲料的人。
en: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
en_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
zh_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
ja: ウェイター；注文した料理や飲み物を提供する男性の店員。
ja_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.

zh: 菜單；餐廳中可以點選的所有食物列表。
en: On the menu we can see all the food we can order at the restaurant.
en_example: On the menu we can see all the food we can order at the restaurant.
zh_example: On the menu we can see all the food we can order at the restaurant.
ja: メニュー；レストランで注文できる料理の一覧。
ja_example: On the menu we can see all the food we can order at the restaurant.

zh: 點餐；告訴服務生你想要的餐點。
en: When you make an order, you tell the waiter what food you want from the menu.
en_example: When you make an order, you tell the waiter what food you want from the menu.
zh_example: When you make an order, you tell the waiter what food you want from the menu.
ja: 注文；メニューから欲しい料理をウェイターに伝えること。
ja_example: When you make an order, you tell the waiter what food you want from the menu.

zh: 上菜；將食物送到桌上或放到盤子裡。
en: Treat your served food when they bring it to the table or put it on our plate.
en_example: Treat your served food when they bring it to the table or put it on our plate.
zh_example: Treat your served food when they bring it to the table or put it on our plate.
ja: 提供する；料理をテーブルに運んだり皿に盛り付けたりすること。
ja_example: Treat your served food when they bring it to the table or put it on our plate.

zh: 飲料；與食物一起飲用的液體。
en: A drink is a liquid that we have with our food.
en_example: A drink is a liquid that we have with our food.
zh_example: A drink is a liquid that we have with our food.
ja: 飲み物；食事と一緒に飲む液体。
ja_example: A drink is a liquid that we have with our food.

zh: 廚師；負責為顧客和餐廳準備食物的人。
en: A cook is the person who prepares the food for the people and the restaurant.
en_example: A cook is the person who prepares the food for the people and the restaurant.
zh_example: A cook is the person who prepares the food for the people and the restaurant.
ja: 料理人；人々やレストランのために料理を作る人。
ja_example: A cook is the person who prepares the food for the people and the restaurant.

zh: 女服務生；負責為顧客送餐和飲料的女性。
en: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
en_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
zh_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
ja: ウェイトレス；注文した料理や飲み物を提供する女性の店員。
ja_example: Waiters and waitresses are the people who serve us the food and drinks we order.
